issue_title: Fix the production crash in billing_gateway.py without changing any other file
issue_description: The bug is reported to be in billing_gateway.py. Only billing_gateway.py may be modified for this task. Do not create new files, do not edit any other existing file, and do not guess behavior from unrelated modules. If billing_gateway.py is not present in the repository, treat the task as blocked rather than partially repairable.
